name: Sleep Apnea - Polysomnography WITHOUT Diagnosis (Negative Sleep Study)
description: **Negation test on Procedure resource.** Find patients who underwent polysomnography but do NOT have a sleep apnea diagnosis. These are negative sleep studies — patients evaluated for sleep apnea but found not to have it. Clinically important: these patients may need workup for other sleep disorders (insomnia, restless legs, narcolepsy). Tests two-query subtraction with a Procedure-based query on the kept side.
prompt: Find patients who have undergone a polysomnography sleep study but do NOT have any sleep apnea diagnosis. The intent is to identify patients with negative sleep studies who may have other sleep disorders requiring different workup.

prompts.naive: Find sleep studies without sleep apnea.
prompts.broad: Find patients with a polysomnography Procedure but NO sleep apnea Condition. Use a two-query subtraction: polysomnography patients minus sleep-apnea-diagnosed patients.
prompts.expert: Set difference: Procedure patients (polysomnography 60554003) MINUS Condition patients (sleep apnea codes 73430006, 78275009, 27405005, 1101000119103, 230493001). Two queries: (1) `Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|60554003`, (2) `Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|73430006,78275009,27405005,1101000119103,230493001`. Return query 1 MINUS query 2. The remaining patients are negative-study cases.

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Set difference (polysomnography patients) MINUS (sleep-apnea-diagnosed patients). Tests negation with Procedure on the kept side.
